label: Vespera Tertius Ashenward City
description: Vespera Tertius Ashenward City stands as a compact fortress-metropolis raised from black basalt and slagcrete, its tiered hab-blocks bonded into continuous windbreak walls against the planet’s ash-laden gales. Bruise-colored auroral glare and electrostatic stormlight turn its streets into hard-edged corridors of violet reflection across vitrified paving and soot-darkened facades. Vox masts, beacon pylons, and shielded relay housings punctuate the skyline, engineered to endure constant atmospheric interference and the world’s corrupted long-range transmissions. Perimeter causeways and barricaded service trenches define the city’s limits, separating controlled precincts from the surrounding glassy impact fields and ash-choked basins.
